rows.description: Stipond. Pro Augment. Rect. Jo Longwithenham
rows.notes: This row was reconstructed by visual override. gemini-flash incorrectly split this single entry into two rows (missing amounts for its row 20, then the description and amount for its row 21). gpt-5-mini correctly identified it as a single row but failed to extract the monetary amount. The description and amount, including the 'q' for 0.25 farthing, are clearly legible in the image.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid for the augmentation of the rectory of John Longwithenham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid for the augmentation of the rectory of John Longwithenham, amounting to £39 11s 1.25d.

rows.description: 1754 Jan. 28. mrs Upton pro Decrsm. Rect. Nat. 1755.
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description and amounts are visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini failed to extract the amount and had several misinterpretations in the description ('Mr' instead of 'mrs', 'Decern.' instead of 'Decrsm.', 'Post. nat.' instead of 'Rect. Nat.'). The amounts are clear in the image.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mrs Upton recorded by the bursar relating to the rectory/associated charge for 1755.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mrs Upton recorded by the bursar relating to the rectory/associated charge for 1755, amounting to £51 4s 11d.

rows.description: April. 27. mrs Upton pro Decrsm. Gest. Nat. 1756.

The amounts are clear in the image, including the 'q' for 0.25.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mrs Upton recorded by the bursar relating to the rectory/associated charge for 1756.

rows.description: Sept 28. mrs Wolbor pro Decrsm. Gest. D.I.B. 1757
rows.notes: gemini-flash's description is mostly accurate, corrected 'Wolboe' to 'Wolbor' by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini completely misidentified this row's description and failed to extract the amount (proposing two incorrect blank rows). The amount's fraction was overridden based on visual verification: the trailing symbol 'dbq' clearly indicates three-farthings (0.75), which gemini-flash incorrectly interpreted as 'dq' for 0.25.
